title: Vihreä kulta
writer: Ossi Elstelä, Valentin Vaala, Hella Wuolijoki
actors: Hanna Taini, Olavi Reimas, Sven Relander
plot: Governess Kristine Bergman arrives in her native Lapland with her husband Gustav Bergman. On a night-time sleigh ride, she meets and falls in love with the head forester Suontaa, who responds to her feelings.
